ranked_matches:
Here’s your ranked list of the **TOP 10 jobs** in Lahore/Pakistan, ordered from **BEST to WORST match** based on skill overlap, experience level, and role alignment:

---

### **1. Machine Learning Engineer (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 90/100**
   **Why:** Perfect fit for a **mid-level ML Engineer**—covers all core skills (Python, Scikit-Learn, TF-IDF, Random Forest, etc.) and includes deployment tools (Streamlit/FastAPI) critical for ML engineering.
   **Missing:** No explicit mention of **PyTorch/TensorFlow** (though Scikit-Learn + Random Forest suffice for many ML tasks).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-engineer-remote-at-hire-feed-4434738409)

---

### **2. Machine Learning (AI) Engineer (Hybrid) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 88/100**
   **Why:** Hybrid role aligns well with your skills (Python, NLP tools, ML models) and includes **local Lahore flexibility**—ideal for mid-level ML engineers.
   **Missing:** Lacks emphasis on **scalable production systems** (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes), though Streamlit/FastAPI help bridge this.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-ai-engineer-hybrid-at-hire-feed-4434724165)

---

### **3. Artificial Intelligence Specialist at Recruitzz (Lahore)**
   **Match Score: 85/100**
   **Why:** Local Lahore role with strong overlap in **Python, Scikit-Learn, and ML algorithms**—great for hands-on AI development.
   **Missing:** Less clarity on **deployment/MLOps** (though Streamlit could compensate).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/artificial-intelligence-specialist-at-recruitzz-4431505029)

---

### **4. Data Scientist - AI/ML (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 82/100**
   **Why:** Directly matches **Data Scientist** skills (TF-IDF, Logistic Regression, Pandas) and includes remote flexibility.
   **Missing:** Less emphasis on **ML engineering deployment** (e.g., FastAPI) than pure ML roles.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-scientist-ai-ml-remote-at-hire-feed-4434924820)

---

### **5. Machine Learning Engineer - AI (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 80/100**
   **Why:** Nearly identical to #1 but slightly less emphasis on **hybrid/local roles**—still a strong fit.
   **Missing:** No mention of **NLP-heavy tasks** (though TF-IDF/Cosine Similarity help).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-engineer-ai-remote-at-hire-feed-4434725484)

---

### **6. Senior AI/ML Engineer at Funavry Technologies (Islamabad)**
   **Match Score: 78/100**
   **Why:** Senior-level role with **MLOps/engineering overlap** (Streamlit/FastAPI), but requires **more experience** than mid-level.
   **Missing:** Likely expects **advanced frameworks** (PyTorch/TensorFlow) beyond Scikit-Learn.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-ai-ml-engineer-at-funavry-technologies-4434964117)

---

### **7. Machine Learning Researcher (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 75/100**
   **Why:** Research role aligns with **ML algorithms** (Random Forest, Logistic Regression) but may require **more theoretical depth**.
   **Missing:** Less focus on **production deployment** (Streamlit/FastAPI are secondary here).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-researcher-remote-at-hire-feed-4434488174)

---

### **8. Member of Technical Staff - AI Engineering (Remote) at Hire Feed**
   **Match Score: 73/100**
   **Why:** Broad AI role with **MLOps potential** (Streamlit/FastAPI), but title suggests **more senior responsibilities**.
   **Missing:** May require **systems design** experience beyond your current scope.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/member-of-technical-staff-ai-engineering-remote-at-hire-feed-4434707579)

---

### **9. Artificial Intelligence Engineer, LearnWith.AI (Remote) - $200K/year**
   **Match Score: 70/100**
   **Why:** High-paying role with **MLOps/engineering overlap**, but **$200K salary suggests senior/expert level**.
   **Missing:** Likely expects **deep expertise in modern ML frameworks** (e.g., PyTorch).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/artificial-intelligence-engineer-learnwith-ai-remote-%24200-000-year-usd-at-crossover-4431434060)

---

### **10. ML Engineer (San Francisco, AI Startup)**
   **Match Score: 65/100**
   **Why:** **Not in Lahore** (location mismatch), but skills align well for **ML engineering** (Python, Scikit-Learn, deployment tools).
   **Missing:** **Remote/local option** and **NLP-heavy focus** (PyTorch mentioned but not required).
   **Apply:** [Example](https://example.com/2) *(Note: Not Lahore-based—prioritize local roles first.)*

---

### **Key Takeaways for Lahore Candidates:**
1. **Top 3 picks** (#1–#3) are **perfect fits** for your skills and experience level.
2. **Avoid #10** (SF-based) unless relocation is an option.
3. **Senior roles (#6–#9)** may require **additional experience** in deployment/advanced ML.
4. **Hire Feed** dominates the best matches—apply broadly to their ML/Data Science roles.

**Next Steps:**
- Tailor your resume to highlight **TF-IDF, Cosine Similarity, and Streamlit/FastAPI** for ML engineering roles.
- For local roles (e.g., Recruitzz), emphasize **Lahore-based experience** if applicable.
- If remote is acceptable, prioritize **Hire Feed’s ML Engineer (Remote)**.

jobs.match_reason: Strong alignment with **Machine Learning Engineer** role: Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, NumPy, Random Forest, Logistic Regression, and ML-specific tools (TF-IDF, Cosine Similarity) are highly relevant. Streamlit/FastAPI also support deployment and prototyping, critical for ML engineering.
